_about: Copy for the scorecard. Tiers are high->low. The tier NAMES ({LANG}_name) + ui labels are the fixed, deterministic identity (don't run-to-run vary them). The {LANG}_roast lines are the SAFE DEFAULT/FALLBACK + a tone EXEMPLAR: at runtime the model rewrites axes[].roast in the user's language, idiomatic and aggregate-grounded (ADR 0029), so you needn't hand-localize roasts into every language. Roasts tease changeable HABITS, never the person/ability, and never quote prompt text (ADR 0008). The 'title'/personality summary is model-written (ADR 0008 D3). To add a tier-name locale: add {LANG}_name (and optionally {LANG}_roast) to every tier and a ui.{LANG} block; scorecard.mjs reads them generically and falls back to the default language.

zh.local_privacy_note: 全部分析在你本地完成，prompt 内容不离开你的机器
zh.estimate_note: 排名为本地估算，仅供娱乐

en.local_privacy_note: Analyzed entirely on your machine — your prompts never leave it.
en.estimate_note: Ranking is a local estimate, just for fun.

tiers.zh_roast: 你的 prompt 像手术刀，一句话直达需求
tiers.en_roast: One line, zero fluff — your prompts cut straight to the point.

tiers.zh_roast: 偶尔啰嗦，但基本一击即中
tiers.en_roast: A touch wordy, but you usually nail it on the first shot.
Gets the job done — just takes the scenic route to get there.

tiers.zh_roast: 同一个需求换三种说法说给 AI 听
tiers.en_roast: Same ask, three rephrasings deep — the AI got it the first time.

tiers.zh_roast: 祈祷 AI 能读懂你的心
tiers.en_roast: You toss out a vibe and pray the AI reads your mind.

tiers.zh_roast: 花得少干得多，刀刀见血
tiers.en_roast: Spends little, ships a lot — every token pulls its weight.

tiers.zh_roast: 该花花该省省，账单很健康
tiers.en_roast: Spends where it counts. Your bill looks downright healthy.

tiers.zh_roast: 拿最贵的模型干最简单的活
tiers.en_roast: Calling in Opus to fix a typo.
Clear plan in, clean diff out.

tiers.zh_roast: 稳扎稳打，该测的都测了
tiers.en_roast: Steady hands — you test the parts that matter.
No plan, no safety net. Just send it.

tiers.zh_roast: 一个 session 跨三个无关项目，git diff 看不懂自己干了啥
tiers.en_roast: One session, three unrelated repos — even you can't read your own git diff.
Clocks in every single day — even the AI wants a day off.

tiers.zh_roast: 早 9 晚 9，深夜还在改 bug
准点下班，周末不碰键盘
tiers.en_roast: Logs off on time. Weekends are sacred.
Pulls a vanishing act Monday through Friday.
